2006March 5, 2006

🇮🇹 Vico Equense (Naples), Italy

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Vico Equense, Italy, March 5, 2006 -- March 10, 2006

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2006-03-vico-equense-italy

20 Resolutions

679Plenary
Appointment of QC Coordinator
SC 4 approves the nomination of Peter Benson to serve for a three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
678Plenary
Invite submission of NWI for gear design data exchange
SC 4 invites them to submit any necessary NWI to SC 4 for consideration.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
677Plenary
Participate in JWG with ISO/TC 171/SC 2 on PDF/E
SC 4 expresses its interest to participate in the proposed JWG with ISO/TC 171/SC 2 on PDF/E.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
676Plenary
Establish Working Group 13 on Industrial Data Quality
SC 4 resolves to establish a new Working Group 13, Industrial Data Quality. The task of this working group will be to: * Establish a coherent definition of the structure of Quality Standards to be ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
675Plenary
Submit Technical Corrigenda for STEP modules for publication
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to submit the Technical Corrigenda for the following STEP modules to ISO for publication as second editions. ISO/TS 10303-1103, 1104, 1108, 1109, 1110, 1111, 1112, 112...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
674Plenary
Express interest in taking responsibility for RFID standards and appoint delegates
SC 4 expresses its interest in taking responsibility for Industrial Data application standards for radio frequency identifiers (RFIDs), in cooperation with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
673Plenary
Invite host organizations to organize industry sector themes for meetings
SC 4 invites host organizations to work with the International Industry STEP Centers and the SC 4 Chairman and Secretariat to organize industry sector themes for SC 4 meetings as appropriate, which...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
672Plenary
Extend New Work Item Ballot for AP241
Based on the comments from IAI and SC 4 members, SC 4, as an exception, extends the ballot closing date for the New Work Item proposal on Generic Model for Life Cycle Support of AEC Facilities unti...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
671Plenary
Assign ISO 8000 to WG 12 temporarily
SC 4 assigns the current project ISO 8000 -- (Catalogue Management Systems - Requirements) to its Working Group 12 on a temporary basis until the establishment of a new Working Group 13 for Industr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
670Plenary
Register New Work Items for ISO 10303-52, 10303-53, and 10303-110
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to register the necessary New Work Items for 10303-52, 10303-53, and 10303-110 with ISO, in order to allow them to proceed to DIS ballot.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
669Plenary
Launch AP 203 ed 2 DIS ballot and register New Work Item
SC 4 accepts the proposal of the AP 203 ed2 project team to launch a DIS ballot on the revised Technical Specification ISO/TS 10303-203, and requests its Secretariat to register the necessary New W...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
668Plenary
Request active liaison with ISO/TC 229 and appoint liaison officers
SC 4 requests an active two-way liaison with ISO/TC 229, Nanotechnology, and requests the SC 4 Secretary to confirm these liaisons with the ISO Central Secretariat.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
667Plenary
Reappointment of WG 12 Convenor
SC 4 approves the nomination of Keith Hunten to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
666Plenary
Reappointment of JWG 8 Convenor
SC 4 approves the nomination of Jean-Jacques Michel to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
665Plenary
Reappointment of WG 3 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 approves the nomination of Len Slovensky to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
664Plenary
Approval of Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0224 ed3 |Len Slovensky | |===

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its particular thanks to Rosaria Savarese from the Town Hall for taking time to speak to the SC 4 members.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
